cause_analysis.narrative: My Spa by Sara churned on 2026-03-23 after 222 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 30-day silence starting 2026-03-18. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 39 times, but the client only replied 1. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
